pi_items.source: task.json description field and export_result.sh line 11 SQL query pattern matching '%beverage%packaging%'
setup_task.sh line 18 generates /home/ga/Documents/Concepts/concept_vibrant.png using ImageMagick convert or PIL Image
setup_task.sh line 24 generates /home/ga/Documents/Concepts/concept_minimalist.png using ImageMagick convert or PIL Image
task.json description field states 'Question 1 (Code: C1)' and 'Question 2 (Code: C2)'; verifier.py lines 85 and 94 check for these codes
LimeSurvey official documentation confirms type '5' is the 5-Point Choice question type; task.json description specifies '5-Point Choice type'

privileged_info_summary: The visual_ad_testing_survey task creates a synthetic market research survey with title 'Beverage Packaging Concept Test 2025' containing two questions (codes C1 and C2) of type 5 (5-Point Choice). Two synthetic PNG images are generated: concept_vibrant.png and concept_minimalist.png. These images are programmatically created by setup_task.sh using either ImageMagick or PIL Image library, placed at ~/Documents/Concepts/, and must be uploaded to the LimeSurvey resource manager. The survey must be activated for task completion.
